case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. DEWAYNE DEAMS et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DEAMS, DEWAYNE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-01-2009
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-20-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-20-2009 CONTINUED TO JUL-22-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE MAY-20-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-22-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE ON SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE DEWAYNE DEAMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE RE: SUMMONS; COMPLAINT; VERIFICATION; ATTEMPTED TO SERVE DEWAYNE DEAMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
